sources.IND_25: pems_predictions.json (per-fold-where-held-out CV; cluster-pooled across cluster_n1/n2/n3; ground_truth_m_s used from each row)
sources.OOD_heldout: pems_ood_heldout_exp7_all.json (DAC-4/TAP-2/DAI-1_0.5 4_0.5 prebuilt cluster_n{1,2,3}_systems_ood; EAP-4/SY direct-CIF from pems_ood_5fold)
sources.OOD_heldout_mae_note: OOD_heldout.mae_m_s is computed over OOD_heldout_eval_materials (DAI-1_0.5 4_0.5 excluded as a fail case discussed separately). OOD_heldout.per_material still contains DAI-1_0.5 4_0.5 for reference.

update_log.note: exp7b/lr1e4/lr5e6 families refreshed after equalized rerun (600K steps, p_each=0.5).
